params.prompt:
[Sources: web]

Use browser automation to gather and synthesise a practical proposal: 1) Open Hacker News front page and capture top 5 themes. 2) Open GitHub trending and capture top 5 repositories with language and one-line summary. 3) Produce a phased 1-week execution plan for a solo developer to build one idea inspired by those trends. 4) Include risks, mitigations, and a compact budget/time table. Keep the final answer concise, structured, and cite gathered web evidence inline.
